response.justification: Bogdan is an exceptional candidate for the Senior Fullstack Developer position. He brings over a decade of rich engineering experience that heavily overlaps with the required primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and cloud infrastructure (AWS, Kubernetes). Furthermore, his recent work in AI-agent infrastructure and strong dedication to software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, mentoring) make him a standout fit despite minor gaps in specific frameworks like Nest.js and Kotlin.
strengths: Over 12 years of software engineering experience heavily focused on the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS).
Direct, recent experience building AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows, fulfilling a niche job requirement.
Exceptional commitment to software craftsmanship, demonstrated by extensive TDD usage, open-source testing libraries, and leading developer workshops.
concerns: Lacks explicit mention of Nest.js and Vitest, which are core components of the primary stack.
Secondary backend technologies (Kotlin/Java) have not been used in recent roles according to the resume.
Has held several positions for under two years, which may warrant a discussion regarding long-term commitment.
